name: Banana Muffins- Good
recipeIngredient: Mix dry ingredients Add wet ingredients Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the sugar, flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg beaters (fat-free) until well combined.
4. Add the mashed bananas to the egg beaters and stir until just mixed.
5. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
6. Divide the batter evenly among a greased 12-cup muffin pan.
7. Bake for 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
8. Allow muffins to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing and transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
